perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a black cutout top standing in a warehouse store (Costco), trying on oversized sunglasses while smiling. A large Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The scene cuts to a display of various luxury sunglasses on a shelf, showing brand tags like Gucci and price labels in New Taiwan Dollars. (3) A second woman wearing a black beret and a white frilly top is shown trying on a specific pair of sunglasses that features long golden chains with large circular charms hanging from the arms. She adjusts them carefully, looking into a mirror off-camera. (4) The first woman returns to the frame, posing with different sunglasses and gesturing towards the display cases, showing excitement and approval.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop/electronic background music plays throughout the video. A male voice (narrator) speaks enthusiastically, praising how the sunglasses look on the women. (2) Female voices engage in a conversation, making remarks like 'It looks so good' and discussing the price being around 8,000. (3) Subtle ambient noise of a busy warehouse is present, along with the sound of sunglasses being picked up and placed back on the glass display counters.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout the video. (2) Hook Text: 'Gucci 墨鏡低於 8 折' (Gucci sunglasses below 20% off) and '名牌墨鏡大進貨!' (Big stock of brand sunglasses!) in bold colors. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles such as '哎好好看哦' (Oh, looks so good), '買呀! 這裡有那麼多 Gucci' (Buy it! There are so many Gucci here), and price tags showing '7,999'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Product Showcase -> Character 1 Demo -> Character 2 Demo -> Final Verdict

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 2 distant passers-by blurred in the background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Character 1: Short black hair, black cutout top, silver jewelry. Character 2: Long black hair, black beret, white sleeveless frilly top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, signage for 'AID CENTER' and 'HEARING', and rows of sunglasses displays.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demo -> List-based Product Display -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle recommendation and shopping guide, specifically targeting bargain hunters interested in luxury brands. It uses the visual proof of shopping at Costco to highlight significant discounts on Gucci sunglasses, employing personal demonstrations by the creators to build relatability and desire.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly highlights the 'Costco' logo and focuses on 'Gucci' products with price-comparison hooks, typical of influencer shopping vlogs.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy male narrator providing humorous commentary over female-led fashion clips.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges the gap between 'budget' shopping (Costco) and 'luxury' goods (Gucci), appealing to a savvy consumer demographic in Taiwan.
